cases.label: Software developer strong match

analysis.summary: The candidate demonstrates a robust alignment with modern software development roles, particularly those focused on TypeScript and React ecosystems. Their experience with APIs, testing, and version control matches the core requirements across the majority of the listed positions.
matchedStrengths: Experience with SQL and cloud deployments
missingSignals: Specific cloud provider experience (e.g., AWS, Azure)
resumeSuggestions: Explicitly name the cloud platforms used (e.g., AWS, GCP) instead of using the general term 'cloud platforms'
Add experience with containerization tools like Docker if applicable
Highlight any backend-specific frameworks like Node.js or Python to improve matches for full-stack and backend roles

jobMatches.title: Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Near-perfect match for the tech stack including React, TypeScript, Git, and REST APIs.

jobMatches.title: Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches TypeScript, JavaScript, and testing requirements, along with Agile experience.

jobMatches.title: Platform Developer
jobMatches.reason: Strong match for API, Git, and SQL, though missing specific Docker experience.

jobMatches.title: Backend Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches API, SQL, and testing needs, but lacks the requested Python proficiency.

jobMatches.title: Full Stack Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches SQL and cloud deployment needs, but missing core requirements like Node.js and Docker.

analysis.disclaimer: This is a coaching estimate for resume improvement, not a hiring decision or guarantee.

cases.notes: This is the best-aligned case and should land in the upper range.

cases.label: Frontend developer junior match

analysis.summary: The candidate is a junior-level frontend developer with a solid foundation in React, TypeScript, and accessibility. Their skills align well with modern frontend stacks, though they may lack the seniority or specific framework experience (like Angular) required for some roles.
resumeSuggestions: Include specific examples of Agile ceremony participation if applicable
Detail API integration projects to address the backend exposure gap
Quantify the impact of accessibility improvements on user metrics
List specific deployment tools or cloud platforms used in projects

jobMatches.title: Frontend Engineer
jobMatches.reason: Excellent alignment with React, TypeScript, and the candidate's specific focus on accessibility.

jobMatches.title: Frontend Developer
jobMatches.reason: Strong match for React and component library work, though candidate needs to demonstrate Agile experience.

jobMatches.title: Senior Frontend Developer
jobMatches.reason: Tech stack matches well, but the 'Senior' requirement suggests a seniority gap for an internship-level candidate.

jobMatches.title: Frontend Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches UI design needs, but candidate lacks the mentioned mentorship experience and cloud-native depth.

jobMatches.title: Angular Frontend Developer
jobMatches.reason: The role requires Angular and RxJS, while the candidate's experience is primarily React-based.

analysis.disclaimer: This is a coaching estimate for resume improvement, not a hiring decision or guarantee.

cases.notes: Good UI alignment, but not a full senior frontend profile.

cases.label: Data analyst strong match

analysis.summary: The candidate demonstrates a high level of technical alignment for Data Analyst and Business Intelligence roles, possessing a full stack of common industry tools including SQL, Python, and major BI platforms. Their experience spanning data cleaning, visualization, and stakeholder communication directly addresses the core requirements of the listed positions.
matchedStrengths: Proficiency in both Tableau and Power BI
Hands-on experience with SQL and Python for data workflows
Experience delivering insights to product and operations teams
missingSignals: Experience with specific data governance frameworks
Exposure to cloud-based data warehouses like Snowflake or BigQuery
resumeSuggestions: Include specific metrics and KPIs to quantify the impact of previous dashboards
Detail the scale of datasets handled in SQL or Python projects
Mention any experience with ETL processes or automated reporting pipelines

jobMatches.title: Data Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Strong match for the SQL and stakeholder reporting requirements with specific mention of product and operations teams.

jobMatches.title: Junior Data Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Excellent fit as the candidate possesses all mentioned tools (Excel/Power BI) and the experience level aligns well with a junior role.

jobMatches.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Good match for Tableau reporting and self-serve analytics assets requirements.

jobMatches.title: Data Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Direct alignment with the Python and SQL requirements for data governance and metrics reporting.

jobMatches.title: Data Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Strong alignment with the requirements for interactive visualizations and strategic decision-making support.

analysis.disclaimer: This is a coaching estimate for resume improvement, not a hiring decision or guarantee.

cases.notes: This case should improve once analyst-oriented keyword extraction gets better.

cases.label: Product manager partial match

analysis.summary: The candidate demonstrates strong foundational experience in product operations and coordination, specifically within Agile environments and stakeholder management. However, they lack a formal Product Manager title and the strategic ownership or P&L responsibility required for most of the senior-level positions listed.
matchedStrengths: Experience with Jira and requirement documentation
Background in stakeholder interviews and cross-functional coordination
Exposure to product metrics and launch processes
missingSignals: Demonstrated experience in product strategy and vision
Full ownership of a product roadmap
resumeSuggestions: Explicitly quantify the impact of the roadmap support provided using metrics
If possible, change title to 'Associate Product Manager' or 'Product Analyst' to better align with PM searches
Detail specific outcomes from stakeholder interviews, such as features defined or problems solved
Mention specific product analytics tools used (e.g., Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Amplitude)

jobMatches.title: Product Manager
jobMatches.reason: This role focuses on analysis, stakeholder coordination, and file maintenance, which aligns perfectly with the candidate's coordinator background.

jobMatches.title: Digital Product Manager
jobMatches.reason: Good match for roadmap prioritization and stakeholder input, though the candidate will need to prove they can own the roadmap rather than just support it.

jobMatches.title: Product Manager
jobMatches.reason: Matches well with translating customer problems and roadmap priorities, but requires more engineering collaboration experience.

jobMatches.title: Senior Product Manager
jobMatches.reason: The candidate lacks the 'Senior' level strategy execution and product strategy definition required for this role.

jobMatches.title: Principal Product Manager
jobMatches.reason: This role requires leading large-scale experimentation and growth initiatives which exceed the candidate's current experience level.

analysis.disclaimer: This is a coaching estimate for resume improvement, not a hiring decision or guarantee.

cases.notes: The resume has adjacent PM experience, but should still show clear gaps.

cases.label: Career transition partial match

analysis.summary: The candidate is a bootcamp graduate with a strong foundation in core web technologies like JavaScript, SQL, and REST APIs. While they possess the baseline technical skills for junior development roles, they lack professional industry experience and specific modern tooling such as TypeScript, Docker, and cloud platforms mentioned across several job listings.
matchedStrengths: Proficiency in JavaScript and frontend development basics
Experience with SQL and database interactions
resumeSuggestions: Explicitly list any testing frameworks used in projects (e.g., Jest, Mocha, Cypress) to address testing requirements.
Detail specific React or frontend framework experience to better align with frontend-heavy roles.
Incorporate keywords related to Agile methodologies if practiced during the bootcamp.
Highlight any exposure to Python or Node.js to bridge the gap for backend-focused roles.

jobMatches.title: Platform Developer
jobMatches.reason: Strong match for core requirements including SQL, Git, and API integrations, though lacks Docker experience.

jobMatches.title: Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches Git and API requirements; however, the candidate needs to demonstrate React and TypeScript skills.

jobMatches.title: Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Aligns with JavaScript and teamwork requirements, but lacks the requested TypeScript and testing depth.

jobMatches.title: Backend Software Developer
jobMatches.reason: Candidate has SQL and API skills, but the role requires Python and stronger testing experience.

jobMatches.title: Full Stack Developer
jobMatches.reason: Matches SQL needs, but candidate lacks professional experience with Node.js, AWS, and Docker.

analysis.disclaimer: This is a coaching estimate for resume improvement, not a hiring decision or guarantee.

cases.notes: This case should stay in partial-match territory.
